title: Kuma’s Promise to Bonney
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kuma, Bonney, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Nusjuro as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bonney,

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Bonney finds out the truth?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have you seen it all?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am sorry, I've broken the promise...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: ...that I made to Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, my.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's a gift for your 10th birthday.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma entrusted me with it,

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: It's from Dad?! I'm so happy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's so beautiful!! It's a sapphire!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This necklace looks just like the sun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I will cherish it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He said it was meant to be a protective charm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, of course...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think that kid would evolve so much in only two years!! Nobody could have imagined it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "Straw hat"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is the child of a very good friend of Dad's...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... I was surprised to see you two ended up coming here together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fate is such a strange thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A lot of incidents have happened at egghead,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Since you went inside that room,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am actually being saved by straw hat's crew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will tell you everything, so calm down and let's join up with them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Bonney...

dialogue.speaker: Nusjuro
dialogue.text: ...but I don't have a choice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was not the fault of a scientist doing his job!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The ones who were truly bad were...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: These guys!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
